ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported
e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: Does your school have a Gay-Straight Alliance (or similar school club for LGBTQ+ students)?
Notes: 0 = No; 1 = Yes; 2 = I don't know; 888 = N/A: Condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: Does your school have a Gay-Straight Alliance (or similar school club for LGBTQ+ students)? - How often have you participated in this club in the past 6 months?
Notes: 0 = Not at all; 1 = Almost never; 2 = Sometimes; 3=Often; 888 = N/A: Condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: In the past 6 months, how generally supportive has your school climate been for LGBTQ+ students?
Notes: 1 = Very unsupportive; 2 = Slightly unsupportive; 3 = Neutral; 4 = Slightly supportive; 5 = Strongly supportive; 888 = N/A: Condition skipped; 999 = Missing/no answer
